columns.name: nickname
columns.description: Short name or first name used in the UI

columns.name: role
columns.description: How the user knows this person, e.g. colleague, client, investor, friend

columns.name: organization
columns.description: Company or organisation this person belongs to

columns.name: photo_url
columns.description: URL to profile photo — absolute URL, relative path like /photos/deepak.jpg, or pod file path like /pod/photos/id.jpg

columns.name: notes
columns.description: Anything the agent should remember about this person
